name: Dog Helmet
description: A protective helmet for a dog, providing protection to the head from physical and energy attacks.
longDescription: A protective helmet designed for dogs, offering coverage to the head. It provides a modest amount of physical and energy damage resistance, keeping your canine companion safe in combat.

name: Light Dog Armor
description: Lightweight armor for dogs, covering the torso and legs with basic protection.
longDescription: Light armor designed for dogs, covering the torso and legs. Provides basic physical and energy damage resistance without weighing the animal down too much, allowing for mobility in combat.

name: Medium Dog Armor
description: Medium-grade armor for dogs, offering improved protection for the torso and legs.
longDescription: Medium armor for canine companions, providing improved physical and energy damage resistance over light armor. Covers the torso and legs with sturdier materials for better battlefield protection.

name: Heavy Dog Armor
description: Heavy-duty armor for dogs, maximizing protection at the cost of weight.
longDescription: Heavy armor designed for dogs, offering the maximum level of physical and energy damage resistance. The sturdier construction provides superior protection but adds weight that may impact mobility.
